grant_title: Undergraduate Research in Comparative Functional Genomics (INBRE)
project_area: Biomedical research in comparative functional genomics
demographic_requirements: Honors College students at the University of Maine working on Honors theses in biomedical research with INBRE research scientists
eligibility_summary: Open to Honors College students at the University of Maine engaged in biomedical research in comparative functional genomics, including thesis, pre-thesis, and summer research fellowships, as well as specific courses (HON 150/155, HON 350) and the Genomics Research Collaborative.
